subparts.text: Is a neural network comprising a single hidden layer capable of effectively representing and solving all possible Boolean functions where number of Boolean inputs are quite high? Justify your answer with appropriate reason
How do we tune the hyperparameters of the input layer? Which factors effect the hyperparameters of input layer.
Why is logistic function not appropriate for hidden layers of CNN? Explain the problems in details.
Can we use Autoencoders for dimensionality reduction? Justify this statement with suitable example.

questions.question_text: Consider a three-input perceptron with weight vector a [0.1,0.3,0.4] and bias of 0. For the input vector of [0.1, -0.4, -0.5] and output label as 1 and cost function as sum of squared error, what will be the updated weights values after two iterations of gradient descent algorithm ?
Differentiate between Overfitting vs Underfitting. Explain the different techniques to handle overfitting in detail.
“ReLU is suitable for CNN while TanH is suitable for RNN”. Justify this statement with appropriate reason. Also discuss the other activation functions available for deep learning models.
Explain the LSTM and GRU unit along with architectural difference.
“Transfer Learning is better for Image Classification”. Identify the scenarios wherein the above statement holds true. Justify with appropriate reason.
Explain the VGG16, ResNet, and InceptionNet along with their architecture. Identify the advantages of each model
Discuss the loss functions of GAN architecture along with its complete working. How these loss functions lead to better training.
Explain the advantages of regularized autoencoders over under- complete autoencoders along with their architectural difference.
